decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts statistical change point analysis on mobility data from 10 countries to relate mobility shifts to COVID-19 infections and mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multinational infectious-disease application of change-point analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares three change-point methods on simulations and validates them against vaccine adverse-event reports using accuracy, sensitivity, and specificity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance evaluation and validation of change-point analysis for safety-signal detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the E-divisive procedure to estimate multiple change points in COVID-19 cases and deaths across India and WHO regions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to infectious-disease incidence and mortality series.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates a distribution-free control scheme based on change-point analysis through simulations and empirical comparison with competing epidemic-detection methods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative performance assessment of a change-point detection scheme.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses binary segmentation to identify statistically significant change points in lumpy skin disease outbreak reports.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete animal infectious-disease application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Bayesian change point analysis to identify influenza epidemic periods from event-based surveillance report frequencies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to influenza outbreak detection in 24 countries.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits nonlinear mixed changepoint models to quarterly and yearly antibiotic-consumption data to detect pandemic-associated shifts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete antimicrobial-use application associated with COVID-19.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the Mann-Kendall-Sneyers test for change-point detection and validates its effectiveness against binary segmentation and segment regression.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparison and agreement assessment among change-point tests.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a QMLE-based statistic for epidemic change-point detection and establishes its asymptotic behavior and consistency in power.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development supported by theory, simulation, and real-data examples.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares iterative sequential regression and GAM second derivatives for consistency and timeliness in detecting SARS-CoV-2 growth-rate change points.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative evaluation of change-point detection performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses change point detection to identify shifts in seasonal infectious-disease outbreak trends around the COVID-19 pandemic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application across four infectious diseases in Korea.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an early warning sign for previously overlooked saddle-escape critical transitions and illustrates it in network models and epidemiological data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a new critical-transition warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures critical slowing down in vaccine-related social data and models it near a tipping point in vaccination behavior.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of a critical-transition indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests whether spatial correlation and critical slowing down precede regime shifts across several simulated disease-behavior network types.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of an early-warning indicator across network structures and parameter values.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes network-structure measures as early-warning indicators and compares their performance before vaccine-refusal regime shifts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal and comparative assessment of new indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops seven indicators and a PCA score to forecast transitions from endemic to epidemic phases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a transition-forecasting indicator framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a deep-learning early-warning indicator trained on stochastic disease-spreading models with multiple noise processes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development with simulated and real COVID-19 demonstrations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the suitability and performance of temporal and spatial early-warning statistics using theory, simulations, COVID-19 cases, and hospitalization data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of early-warning signals for epidemic transitions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests NHS Direct vomiting calls against laboratory reports and derives an alert rule providing up to four weeks of norovirus warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reliability and lead-time evaluation of an early-warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses laboratory and phylogenetic surveillance to detect dengue serotype and clade replacement for early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete dengue-surveillance application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether an automated surveillance network and three statistical methods detect unusual Salmonella contamination promptly.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of early-detection performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes Argus and HealthMap media reports as event-based early warning around the 2009 influenza pandemic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of event-based early warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews outbreak-anticipation tools and argues that monitoring-system evaluation should extend beyond detecting aberrations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Methodological overview offering evaluative guidance and limitations for early-warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the Early Warning and Response System to collect and analyze early-phase European pandemic influenza surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application during the 2009 influenza pandemic.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses WSARE algorithms using simulated real-time measles monitoring and evaluates their timeliness and effectiveness for early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit applicability and performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses the impact of Pakistan's Disease Early Warning System using alerts, investigations, controlled outbreaks, and reported preventive actions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of system effectiveness in disasters and conflict crises.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies Google Earth to three-dimensional visualization of infectious-disease early-warning outputs from prospective space-time analyses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to bacillary dysentery surveillance warnings.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares moving-percentile early-warning thresholds using outbreak detection, detection time, and signal volume in CIDARS.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct threshold-performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the Java-based IBIS(SH) package, its temporal and spatial warning modules, and automated bulletin generation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation of a spatiotemporal early-warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Prospectively evaluates DYCAST for West Nile virus warning using sensitivity, specificity, agreement, and lead time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance evaluation of an operational early-warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Identifies environmental and demographic outbreak predictors specifically to develop a municipal malaria early-warning system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development toward a malaria warning model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the suitability, biases, and outbreak-detection utility of abattoir data proposed for swine early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of data-source limitations and detection performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits an ARIMA model to influenza-like illness counts and uses it for prediction and early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete influenza forecasting application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs and tests an influenza early-warning model using rough sets, support vector machines, weather, and Yunqi theory.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of an early-warning model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops remote-sensing SARIMA models for malaria warning and compares predictive fit with and without environmental covariates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and assessment of malaria early-warning models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews dengue models as early-warning systems and identifies inadequate treatment of spatiotemporal features and geographic limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Methodological review providing direct limitations and guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes, trials, and deploys a simplified syndromic surveillance design for timely outbreak warning in Pacific islands.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a simplified early-warning surveillance approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces ISR-based severity monitoring and demonstrates earlier detection than mortality monitoring through multicenter data and simulation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a novel early-warning surveillance technique.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a tuberculosis monitoring and warning index system through literature review, expert meetings, and Delphi consultation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological construction of a weighted warning-index system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates a refined Bayesian spatiotemporal dengue warning model with probabilistic alerts and a new forecast visualization.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit model development with out-of-sample validation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the usefulness and data-quality limitations of Pakistan's enhanced Disease Early Warning System after flooding.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational system evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses active virological surveillance for early detection of dengue transmission, serotype circulation, and epidemic emergence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete dengue early-warning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures temperature-dependent parasite development but neither deploys nor evaluates an early-warning method; it only notes this factor should be considered in future system establishment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides contextual biological input rather than a lineage source for early-warning signals.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds a GIS landmark library and image-management system for malaria early-warning areas using GPS and Google Earth.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit implementation of a digital malaria warning platform.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sentinel chickens and mosquitoes to detect West Nile virus circulation one month before human cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete West Nile virus early-warning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Formulates an alarm-herd concept from longitudinal antibody aberrations to warn of Salmonella Dublin status changes one quarter ahead.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a new surveillance warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates tick-based surveillance against human babesiosis patterns and concludes it can warn of geographic disease emergence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of a proposed early-warning data source.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the Media Scanning and Verification Cell using verification rates, outbreak yield, sensitivity, and detection timing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance assessment for detecting early-warning signals.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs a real-time schistosomiasis monitoring and warning platform with electronic maps, GPS/3G tracking, SMS alerts, and automated reports.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit implementation of an operational warning platform.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates a pigeon-based West Nile virus system for efficacy and lead time before human cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of warning performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports poliovirus transmission detected by a sewage-monitoring early-warning system before any active polio cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete poliovirus early-warning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates how an automatic malaria warning system and its SMS signals affected investigation and response completion rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational effectiveness assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Devises a hierarchical Bayesian dengue warning framework, calibrates alert thresholds, and issues three-month-ahead World Cup forecasts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development with retrospective performance assessment and prospective use.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests climate and land-use variables as early-warning predictors of mosquito-season timing and abundance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of candidate warning predictors.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs moving-average control charts and warning thresholds for diarrheal syndromic surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of early-warning control charts.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses chicken surveillance against human West Nile virus incidence and demonstrates approximately 1.5 months of warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct reliability and lead-time assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes implementation and operation of an EWARN in five health facilities after the Solomon Islands tsunami.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit field implementation of an early-warning alert and response network.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes influenza viral evolution and only states that future monitoring could provide early warning; no warning method is applied or evaluated.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Hypothetical relevance is not a concrete lineage lead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an adjusted iterative Serfling model and compares its sensitivity, specificity, and lead time with traditional models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological modification for improved influenza peak warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the E3 Network and three implemented prototype vector-borne-disease warning case studies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational implementation of prototype early-warning systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes and verifies a spatial early-warning model for areas at high risk of human H7N9 infection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and outbreak-based verification of a warning model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates mosquito indices, derives prediction thresholds, and reports weak evidence for reliable dengue prediction.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance and limitation assessment of an early-warning tool.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates emergency-department respiratory indicators and identifies age-specific signals sensitive to increasing RSV activity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of indicators proposed for respiratory early warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares costs and reporting effectiveness across three components of a syndromic early-warning system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit cost-effectiveness evaluation of system components.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides the open-source EASTWeb application for automated remote-sensing data discovery, processing, and scheduling in disease warning systems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation supporting infectious-disease forecasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests daily spirometry as a pneumonia warning tool in a randomized trial and derives a sensitive and specific FEV1 threshold.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct clinical validation of an early-warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops LASSO-based three-month dengue forecast models and compares them with SARIMA and step-down regression.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and comparative validation of an operational warning model.
named_source_mentions: Three-month real-time dengue forecast models: an early warning system for outbreak alerts and policy decision support in Singapore

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses camera-derived optical-flow behavior to identify chicken flocks likely to become Campylobacter-positive earlier than microbiological testing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infection-warning application in poultry.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs and historically validates a support-vector-machine influenza-like-illness warning model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a forecasting model for early detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests whether spatiotemporal AFP cluster detection using the Kulldorff scan statistic would warn of polio outbreaks before official confirmation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit retrospective performance and lead-time evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates probabilistic dengue forecasts from a prototype warning system and compares them with a seasonal-average null model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct out-of-sample forecast evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the signal-strength indicator's association with suspected outbreak signals in CIDARS.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of a warning-signal metric.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops temperature, humidity, and disease models and combines them into a cucumber disease warning system validated against observed occurrence dates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of an early-warning method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares four influenza warning methods using sensitivity, specificity, predictive value, Jorden index, and kappa.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether the Pacific Syndromic Surveillance System meets its objectives and identifies persistent timeliness, completeness, quality, and stability problems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational system evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses Turkish warning-and-response systems against EU policy and discusses current challenges, limitations, and needed improvements.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Policy-oriented assessment providing explicit limitations and improvement guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports a trichinellosis outbreak and merely concludes that warning alerts remain indispensable; it does not apply or evaluate a warning method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No concrete lineage contribution for early-warning signals.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes H5N8 spread and only suggests that improved understanding may help provide future warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No early-warning method is developed, used, or evaluated.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies how underreporting and reporting delays affect the sensitivity of several syndromic warning models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of data-quality effects on warning performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates ENSO indices and monsoon rainfall as geographically varying predictors of malaria outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of a proposed climate-based warning tool.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a dynamical-network-biomarker composite index and decision pattern for identifying the critical state before influenza outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an outbreak warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares completeness, timeliness, and scanning burden across information sources used by the Netherlands Early Warning Committee.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of source performance within an early-warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Afghanistan Disease Early Warning System data to estimate seasonal and long-term trends in six vaccine-preventable diseases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete analysis using operational infectious-disease warning-system data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an operational moving-percentile procedure for selecting disease-specific CIDARS warning thresholds and validates it with simulated outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development and validation of threshold selection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a climate-risk Early Warning Signal model that detected most dengue outbreaks one to five months ahead.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and empirical assessment of a dengue warning model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares six remotely sensed flooding indicators and validates MNDWI thresholds for predicting leptospirosis risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of candidate indicators for a warning tool.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses CUSUM in school syndromic surveillance to detect ten influenza outbreaks and support early intervention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete school-based influenza warning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the ECDC Vibrio Map Viewer platform for monitoring environmental suitability and demonstrates detection of conditions accompanying Swedish cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit implementation of a remotely sensed warning platform.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retrospectively characterizes respiratory healthcare burden and only suggests that age-specific algorithms may improve future warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No early-warning method is actually deployed or evaluated for warning performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Argues that laboratory surveillance based only on clinical samples is unlikely to function as an early-warning system and details structural data limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological limitation and surveillance-improvement guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews EWARN implementation and evaluation protocols and identifies unmet needs for standardized training and remote-support guidance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit guidance-oriented discussion of system gaps and required improvements.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes a sentinel tree nursery and uses its findings to reveal potentially harmful pathogens associated with internationally traded plants.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete plant-pathogen early-warning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a sine-curve and case/mean-ratio method that predicts malaria outbreaks one to two months ahead.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a new malaria warning method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports development, field testing, user-guided revision, and R-based software implementation of EWARS and EWARS-R.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software and toolkit implementation for prospective dengue warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses acute-gastroenteritis and norovirus surveillance to detect a GII.17 variant months before winter outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete norovirus early-warning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements a community and hospital event-based surveillance pilot in four Vietnamese provinces and demonstrates earlier outbreak reporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit field implementation of an early-warning and response system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports dengue infections and serotype co-circulation but only recommends future cross-border monitoring as early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No warning method is deployed or evaluated.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Identifies detection, reporting, response, and coordination failures and argues for coordinated systems capable of recognizing early pathogen-emergence signals.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit strategic guidance on global early-warning and response mechanisms.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes intergovernmental reporting frameworks and informal signal tracking but does not itself apply, evaluate, critique, or implement an early-warning method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Authoritative descriptive guidance on how international reporting systems support early warning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares aerosol and bird-swab detection results and assesses aerosol sampling's suitability for early-warning screening of poultry markets.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit feasibility assessment of a proposed infectious-disease warning indicator.
